events._evidence: Global X Funds N-14/A filed 2023-01-18 (pre/post-effective amendment): 'Emerging Markets Fund...Target Fund (series of Mirae Asset Discovery Funds)...will be converted into an ETF...into Global X Emerging Markets ETF (series of Global X Funds).' Special Meeting scheduled March 1, 2023. Board date not in excerpt; announce_date = filing date. MF/ETF tickers not in excerpt.

Same N-14/A: 'Emerging Markets Great Consumer Fund → Global X Emerging Markets Great Consumer ETF.' Explicit mapping table in excerpt. Board date not in excerpt; announce_date = filing date. MF/ETF tickers not in excerpt.

v._evidence: Goldman Sachs ETF Trust N-14 filed 2022-10-04: registers 'Shares of Goldman Sachs Defensive Equity ETF.' States 'The Acquired Fund [Goldman Sachs Defensive Equity Fund, series of Goldman Sachs Trust] currently operates as an open-end mutual fund. The Acquired Fund will be reorganized into an exchange-traded fund (ETF).' Board 'unanimously approved the Plan' — no date in excerpt; announce_date = filing date. Closing Date not specified (share class cutoffs by January 17-19, 2023). ETF/MF tickers not in excerpt; asset_class: Defensive Equity → equity_US.

Goldman Sachs ETF Trust 497 dated November 8, 2022: 'Goldman Sachs Defensive Equity Fund (Acquired Fund) → Goldman Sachs Defensive Equity ETF (Acquiring Fund).' Special Meeting January 6, 2023. Board 'unanimously approved the Plan' — no board date in excerpt; announce_date = doc date. ETF/MF tickers not in excerpt. Paired with N-14 dd2f89f9a1ba.

events.fund_name: Goldman Sachs Enhanced U.S. Equity Fund
events._evidence: Goldman Sachs ETF Trust N-14 filed 2025-06-20: registers 4 ETFs including 'Goldman Sachs Enhanced U.S. Equity ETF.' Acquired Fund table lists 'Goldman Sachs Enhanced U.S. Equity Fund' with closing ~November 13, 2025. Board date not in excerpt; announce_date = filing date. ETF/MF tickers not in excerpt.

Same N-14: 'Goldman Sachs Focused Value Fund' listed as Acquired Fund with closing ~November 13, 2025. Corresponding ETF is 'Goldman Sachs Value Opportunities ETF' (from registered securities title; name mapping not explicit in excerpt — inferred). asset_class: equity_US.

Same N-14: 'Goldman Sachs Strategic Growth Fund' listed as Acquired Fund with closing ~November 13, 2025. Corresponding ETF: 'Goldman Sachs Growth Opportunities ETF' (name mapping inferred from title, not explicit in excerpt). asset_class: equity_US.

Same N-14: 'Goldman Sachs Technology Opportunities Fund' listed as Acquired Fund with closing ~December 4, 2025. Corresponding ETF: 'Goldman Sachs Technology Oppo[rtunities ETF]' (registered securities title, name match). asset_class: equity_US (technology).

v._note: Four MF→ETF reorganizations; ETF tickers not in excerpt; MF-to-ETF name mappings for Enhanced/Tech are direct; Focused Value→Value Opps and Strategic Growth→Growth Opps inferred.

events._evidence: Goldman Sachs ETF Trust N-14 filed 2026-04-28: registers 'Shares of Goldman Sachs Core Plus Bond ETF and Goldman Sachs Income ETF.' Acquired Funds: 'Goldman Sachs Bond Fund → Goldman Sachs Core Plus Bond ETF.' Closing: shares closed to new investors May 26, 2026; redemption cutoff August 6, 2026. Board approved — no date in excerpt; announce_date = filing date. ETF/MF tickers not in excerpt. asset_class: Bond Fund → fixed_income.
Same N-14: 'Goldman Sachs Income Fund → Goldman Sachs Income ETF.' Closing cutoffs same as Bond Fund. asset_class: Income fund → fixed_income.

Goldman Sachs ETF Trust N-14/A pre-effective amendment 1 filed 2026-06-11: same conversion Goldman Sachs Bond Fund → Goldman Sachs Core Plus Bond ETF. Excerpt shows explicit comparison 'Goldman Sachs Bond Fund | Goldman Sachs Core Plus Bond ETF.' Closing cutoffs same as N-14. Board date not in excerpt; announce_date = filing date. ETF/MF tickers not in excerpt.
Same N-14/A: Goldman Sachs Income Fund → Goldman Sachs Income ETF. Board date not in excerpt.

Goldman Sachs ETF Trust 497 dated June 16, 2026: 'At a meeting held on April 21-22, 2026, the Board of Trustees...approved reorganizations...Goldman Sachs Bond Fund → Goldman Sachs Core Plus Bond ETF.' Shareholder notification: April 24, 2026. Board date = April 21, 2026 (first day of meeting). No closing date specified. MF/ETF tickers not in excerpt. Confidence H: board date explicit, fund names explicit; missing only tickers.
Same 497: 'Goldman Sachs Income Fund → Goldman Sachs Income ETF.' Board meeting April 21-22, 2026; first notification April 24, 2026. Board date = 2026-04-21. No closing date.

v._note: Key filing: provides board approval date April 21-22, 2026. Earliest notification April 24, 2026.

v._evidence: Harbor Funds N-14 filed 2020-03-02: registrant is 'HARBOR FUNDS' (traditional mutual fund trust). Excerpt notes proposed effective date April 1, 2020 per Rule 488 and mentions 'tax-free nature of the Reorganization.' No ETF language visible in excerpt; Harbor Funds is a mutual fund complex → MF-to-MF reorganization. No conversion to ETF identified.
